_note: Sourced 2026-06-19 from each model's official materials (system/model cards, technical reports, launch pages). 1 = the developer reports that benchmark (or a same-family variant, e.g. MMLU-Pro, MMMU-Pro, GMMLU, SimpleQA-Verified, AIME 2026, t2-bench) for this model; 0 = not reported or unconfirmed. The contrast: capability is widely reported, RAI/safety benchmarks rarely. See per-model notes for variant and edge-case details.

notes.GPT-5.2: MMLU (multilingual) + StrongREJECT-filtered are in the system card; GPQA/AIME 2025/SWE-bench Verified/ARC-AGI-2/FrontierMath/tau2/MMMU-Pro from the launch + science pages; HLE unconfirmed (conflicting snippets).
notes.Claude Opus 4.8: Current flagship (supersedes 4.6/4.7). MMLU via GMMLU (multilingual); AIME not reported (uses USAMO 2026); reports BBQ (system card 4.4.2) and SimpleQA-Verified.
notes.Gemini 3 Pro: MMLU via MMMLU; MMMU via MMMU-Pro/Video-MMMU; tau2-bench as t2-bench; SimpleQA via SimpleQA-Verified. Safety is reported via Google's internal evals + Frontier Safety Framework, not public RAI benchmarks.
notes.Grok 4: Capability from the Grok 4 launch page (GPQA 87.5, AIME'25 91.7, ARC-AGI-2 15.9, HLE 25.4 — retrieved via the 2026-05-25 web-archive snapshot of x.ai/news/grok-4); xAI does not report MMLU/SWE-bench/MMMU/FrontierMath/tau2 there. WMDP (bio/chem/cyber) is in the Grok 4 model card. xAI's model cards are safety-only; capability lives on the launch page.
notes.DeepSeek V3.2: MMLU via MMLU-Pro; tau2 as the tech report's tau2-Bench. Reports a SimpleQA score but as an agentic tool-use (web-search) task, not closed-book RAI factuality — so not counted in the RAI grid.
notes.GLM-5: MMLU via MMLU-Pro; AIME as AIME 2026; tau2 as tau2-Bench. SimpleQA unconfirmed (may appear in tech report 6.3.4 as factuality). No safety/RAI section in card or report.
notes.Qwen3.7 Max: MMLU via MMLU-Pro; AIME and tau2 not reported for the 3.7-Max flagship; technical report forthcoming. No safety/RAI section.
